args.code:
# Step 1: Get all opportunities closed in April 2023
import json

# Debug: Let's see what data we have in storage
# First, let's get all opportunities closed in April 2023 with their contract info

# From the previous queries, we have var_functions.query_db:22 which has joined data
# Let's also get the list of opportunities from var_functions.query_db:16

opportunities = []
with open('saved_data/var_functions.list_db:0.json', 'r') as f:
    pass  # This was just listing tables

# Let's load the actual opportunity data from the last few queries

# Get opportunities closed in April 2023 from var_functions.query_db:16
opp_data = []
try:
    with open('saved_data/var_functions.query_db:16.json', 'r') as f:
        opp_data = json.load(f)
except:
    # Use the data directly if it's not a file path
    pass

print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(''))

var_functions.query_db:8.Name: BrightTech Systems - Advanced EDA Integration
var_functions.query_db:8.Description: TechPulse Solutions offers BrightTech Systems a tailored EDA suite with products such as AI DesignShift, OptiPower Max, and CircuitSync Pro. These advanced tools support BrightTech's mission of innovative circuit design and power optimization. Our solution enhances communication networks, introducing efficiency and unparalleled connectivity improvements.

var_functions.query_db:8.Name: Vertex Engineering Tech Enhancement
var_functions.query_db:8.Description: By integrating TechPulse's AI Cirku-Tech and DesignWave Automation, Vertex Engineering Corp can elevate their innovative capabilities and streamline their design processes. The SecureFlow Suite ensures robust data protection as they scale projects. Utilizing the CloudLink Designer will enhance team collaboration across their global projects, aligning with their cloud-based expertise.

var_functions.query_db:8.Name: GreenTech Fusion Partnership
var_functions.query_db:8.Description: TerraSync Solutions is set to enhance its sustainable technology offerings by integrating EcoPCB Creator and AIOptics Vision into their workflows. This partnership aims to optimize product efficiency and environmental impact reduction, highlighting TechPulse Solution's capabilities in providing advanced, eco-conscious technology solutions. The collaboration focuses on seamless implementation and sustainable innovation.

var_functions.query_db:8.Name: SecureLink EDA Enhancement
var_functions.query_db:8.Description: TechPulse Solutions is positioned to enhance SecureLink Technologies' cybersecurity offerings with AI-powered and scalable EDA solutions. Products like SecureFlow Suite and CircuitAI Innovator are shortlisted to integrate into their existing workflows. This partnership emphasizes seamless data protection and rapid deployment, ensuring SecureLink remains at the forefront of cybersecurity innovation.

var_functions.query_db:8.Name: InfiLink Enhanced Integration Opportunity
var_functions.query_db:8.Description: TechPulse Solutions offers InfiLink Solutions a unique chance to further streamline their networking capabilities by utilizing our CloudLink Designer and CircuitSync Pro for seamless design collaboration. By integrating SecureFlow Suite, robust security and compliance in network design can be ensured. Additionally, EcoPCB Creator can introduce sustainable practices into their workflow, maximizing efficiency and environmental responsibility.

var_functions.query_db:8.Name: DigitalWave Solutions EDA Expansion
var_functions.query_db:8.Description: DigitalWave Solutions seeks to enhance its IT consulting services by integrating advanced EDA tools, leveraging products like PulseSim Pro, CloudLink Designer, and SecureFlow Suite. TechPulse Solutions aims to provide a seamless transition with their AI-powered SecureFlow Suite for robust security and data protection needs. The collaboration promises to boost DigitalWave's market competitiveness with streamlined workflows and enhanced design capabilities.

var_functions.query_db:8.Name: EcoLite Sustainable Design Innovation Partnership
var_functions.query_db:8.Description: This opportunity aims to enhance EcoLite Innovations' product architecture with TechPulse Solutions’ advanced platforms like EcoPCB Creator and AIOptics Vision. By integrating OptiEnergy Suite, EcoLite can boost the energy efficiency of their sustainable lighting solutions. SecureFlow Suite will provide robust security and compliance for their design processes, ensuring data integrity across implementations.

var_functions.query_db:8.Name: MetaData Analytics AI Integration Opportunity
var_functions.query_db:8.Description: TechPulse Solutions has an opportunity to expand its footprint with MetaData Analytics by offering PulseSim Pro and AI Cirku-Tech to enhance their analytical capabilities. The SecureFlow Suite can further bolster their data protection and compliance measures, aligning with their security-conscious ethos. Integrating CloudLink Designer could improve their global project collaboration and delivery efficiency.

var_functions.query_db:8.Name: GreenWave Digital Transformation
var_functions.query_db:8.Description: GreenWave Circuits is looking to expand its design capabilities with advanced electronic design automation solutions. By leveraging TechPulse's AI Cirku-Tech and EcoPCB Creator, GreenWave can enhance its design precision while maintaining sustainability in production. With CircuitAI Innovator and OptiPower Max, TechPulse will enable GreenWave to optimize circuit performance and power efficiency.

var_functions.query_db:8.Name: TerraForm Engineering Sustainable Solutions Enhancement
var_functions.query_db:8.Description: TechPulse Solutions offers TerraForm Engineering a unique opportunity to enhance their sustainable civil engineering projects with our AI-powered EcoPCB Creator and OptiPower Manager. By integrating CloudLink Designer for seamless collaboration and DesignWave Automation for process efficiency, we enable TerraForm to further reduce environmental impact. Our SecureFlow Suite ensures unmatched security compliance for all project designs.

var_functions.query_db:8.Name: FutureTech EDA Collaboration Initiative
var_functions.query_db:8.Description: Leveraging TechPulse Solutions' AI DesignShift and CloudInnovate Space to synergize FutureTech's development capabilities with next-gen EDA innovations, fostering enhanced cloud-based design and quick prototyping. SecureFlow Suite integration is expected to bolster data security, crucial for maintaining compliance in their software development operations. By exploiting advanced AI-driven tools and robust security modules, this partnership is set to transform FutureTech's workflows for superior productivity and security.

import json
import pandas as pd
from datetime import datetime

# Load the data from the last query (contracts signed in April 2023)
data = locals().get('var_functions.query_db:30', [])

if not data:
    # Try to read from file
    try:
        with open('saved_data/var_functions.query_db:30.json', 'r') as f:
            data = json.load(f)
    except:
        pass

print('__RESULT__:')
print(data)

var_functions.query_db:8.Name: GreenTech Fusion Partnership
var_functions.query_db:8.Description: TerraSync Solutions is set to enhance its sustainable technology offerings by integrating EcoPCB Creator and AIOptics Vision into their workflows. This partnership aims to optimize product efficiency and environmental impact reduction, highlighting TechPulse Solution's capabilities in providing advanced, eco-conscious technology solutions. The collaboration focuses on seamless implementation and sustainable innovation.

var_functions.query_db:8.Name: SecureLink EDA Enhancement

This partnership emphasizes seamless data protection and rapid deployment, ensuring SecureLink remains at the forefront of cybersecurity innovation.

var_functions.query_db:8.Name: InfiLink Enhanced Integration Opportunity
var_functions.query_db:8.Description: TechPulse Solutions offers InfiLink Solutions a unique chance to further streamline their networking capabilities by utilizing our CloudLink Designer and CircuitSync Pro for seamless design collaboration. By integrating SecureFlow Suite, robust security and compliance in network design can be ensured. Additionally, EcoPCB Creator can introduce sustainable practices into their workflow, maximizing efficiency and environmental responsibility.

var_functions.query_db:8.Name: DigitalWave Solutions EDA Expansion
var_functions.query_db:8.Description: DigitalWave Solutions seeks to enhance its IT consulting services by integrating advanced EDA tools, leveraging products like PulseSim Pro, CloudLink Designer, and SecureFlow Suite. TechPulse Solutions aims to provide a seamless transition with their AI-powered SecureFlow Suite for robust security and data protection needs. The collaboration promises to boost DigitalWave's market competitiveness with streamlined workflows and enhanced design capabilities.

var_functions.query_db:8.Name: EcoLite Sustainable Design Innovation Partnership
var_functions.query_db:8.Description: This opportunity aims to enhance EcoLite Innovations' product architecture with TechPulse Solutions’ advanced platforms like EcoPCB Creator and AIOptics Vision. var_functions.query_db:8.Name: MetaData Analytics AI Integration Opportunity

var_functions.query_db:8.Name: GreenWave Digital Transformation
var_functions.query_db:8.Description: GreenWave Circuits is looking to expand its design capabilities with advanced electronic design automation solutions. By leveraging TechPulse's AI Cirku-Tech and EcoPCB Creator, GreenWave can enhance its design precision while maintaining sustainability in production. With CircuitAI Innovator and OptiPower Max, TechPulse will enable GreenWave to optimize circuit performance and power efficiency.

var_functions.query_db:8.Name: TerraForm Engineering Sustainable Solutions Enhancement
var_functions.query_db:8.Description: TechPulse Solutions offers TerraForm Engineering a unique opportunity to enhance their sustainable civil engineering projects with our AI-powered EcoPCB Creator and OptiPower Manager. var_functions.query_db:8.Name: FutureTech EDA Collaboration Initiative
var_functions.query_db:8.Description: Leveraging TechPulse Solutions' AI DesignShift and CloudInnovate Space to synergize FutureTech's development capabilities with next-gen EDA innovations, fostering enhanced cloud-based design and quick prototyping. val_args.code:
import json
import pandas as pd
from datetime import datetime

# Load the data from the last query (contracts signed in April 2023)
data = locals().get('var_functions.query_db:30', [])

if not data:
    # Try to read from file
    try:
        with open('saved_data/var_functions.query_db:30.json', 'r') as f:
            data = json.load(f)
    except:
        pass

print('__RESULT__:')
print(data)
